eval_criteria.name: concrete_ref
eval_criteria.description: concrete_reference(파일/함수/라인 또는 스펙 섹션)가 모든 패턴에 포함되었는가?

eval_criteria.name: dual_jurisdiction
eval_criteria.description: US jurisdiction_notes(Alice/101)와 KR jurisdiction_notes(KIPO AI/SW)가 쌍으로 있는가?

eval_criteria.name: standard_blocklist
eval_criteria.description: 표준 패턴(MVC, REST 등)이 novelty > 5로 오분류되지 않았는가?

test_inputs: Scan this codebase for patentable patterns in the ML pipeline
Analyze this spec: real-time video compression using neural codecs
Evaluate patentability of a blockchain-based supply chain system
Scan adaptive learning rate optimizer implementation
Review this API design for novel caching mechanisms
